author: Siddhant Gupta
name: Frugendorff Squared Legalized Host
blurb: Unlimited compute track: shared-weight Frugendorff-derived host on 1x H100 SXM with XSA-last-2, VE, late QAT, and int6+zstd export; post-EMA reached 1.1629 BPB at wallclock stop and final sliding-window exact scored 1.15315937 at 15,923,834 total bytes.
